jobs.title: Account Executive, Mid-Market
jobs.content: <p><strong>Account Executive, Mid-Market</strong></p><p>GoFundMe is the dominant social-fundraising platform pioneered around the personal-cause & community-giving data model.</p>

jobs.title: Privacy Program Manager
jobs.content: <p>Lead GoFundMe's Privacy Program function across the social-fundraising platform stack & nonprofit-tech ecosystem.</p>
